rulings.Case Title: SMART BUILDERS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. JANE MARTIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 27, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANT JANE MARTIN Motion For Leave To File First Amended Cross-Complaint GRANTED. First Amended Cross-Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP VS. AMBER R BONCORE-STEWART ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Enforce Stipulation And For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday , March 27, 2017, line 2. PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP's Motion To Enforce Stipulation And For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005, 1013 and 12c. Additionally, moving party failed to comply with SFRL 2.7B. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES VS. JOSEPH WATKINS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Defendant'S Form Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents And Things, And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday , March 27, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANT JOSEPH WATKINS' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Defendant'S Form Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents And Things, And Request For Monetary Sanctions OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice. Last part of the motion filed 4 days before calendared hearing. No courtesy copy of March 23, 2017 filing provided in violation of SFLR 2.7B. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ARLETT PEREZ VS. CARLOS FREDERICO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Summons
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday , March 27, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT CARLOS FREDERICO's Motion to Quash Summons GRANTED. February 26, 2017 service is quashed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YAN LING ZHU VS. QUANG VAN TRAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday , March 27, 2017, line 5. DEFENDANT QUANG TRAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint is sufficiently alleged and there is no misjoinder. Issues regarding number of "rental units" at the Premises are factual and cannot be resolved on a demurrer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RECEIVERS, INC. VS. BIG WINES, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday , March 27, 2017, line 6. DEFENDANT BIG WINES, INC.'s MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS OFF CALENDAR, motion withdrawn. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THIRD AND MISSION ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. LESLIE FOLEY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment; Proposed Response; Proposed Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday , March 27, 2017, line 7. DEFENDANT LESLIE FOLEY's Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment DENIED. = (501/REQ)
